description_long: This sculpture depicts two soldiers in historical military attire, rendered in a realistic style. One soldier stands upright, holding a rifle and wearing a helmet and backpack, while the other is seated or slumped against a low brick wall, appearing wounded or exhausted. The standing figure extends a hand or arm toward the seated figure, suggesting an act of assistance or camaraderie. The surface of the sculpture is weathered, with visible patina and discoloration, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The brick wall forms part of the base and adds context to the scene, evoking a wartime or battlefield environment. The overall composition is dynamic, with detailed folds in the uniforms and expressive postures.
description: A realistic, weathered sculpture of two soldiers in historical military uniforms, one standing and aiding a seated comrade against a brick wall. The figures are detailed and lifelike, evoking a wartime scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing both soldiers clearly, with the standing figure offering support to the seated one against the brick wall.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizing the interaction between the two figures, with the standing soldier's face partially obscured by his helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both soldiers and the detailed brick wall, with backpacks and uniform details visible.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the standing soldier's back and the brick wall, with the seated figure mostly obscured.
attribute_subject_matter: two soldiers in historical military uniforms, one aiding the other
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible, but the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor urban or park environments.
